name: Rice Salad Mold
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked mixed vegetables (such as peas, carrots, corn, green beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice, salt, and black pepper in a small heavy-bottomed pan with a tight-fitting lid. Add 1/4 cup water; bring to a boil, cover, then simmer for 20 minutes without lifting the lid.
2. Put cooked rice in a mixing bowl. Add olive oil, Dijon mustard, cooked mixed vegetables (total of 2 cups), diced green bell pepper, and cucumber. Toss with a fork until well combined.
3. Lightly oil a decorative mold; do not use olive oil for this purpose. Pack the rice mixture into the mold and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled. Unmold just before serving.
